name: Step Family: Fun for All!
description:
Mom and Dad dropped a shocking revelation - nobody in our family is really related. This story is the sexy aftermath!

Yesterday In a shocking revelation, Morgan and Rick told Alice and yourself that you are not biologically related. That no one in the family is related! The reason they decided to tell you now is because Morgan and Rick accidentally discovered Alice’s less than respectable Internet history. After they saw that most of it was wincest porn they started to wonder if this whole situation was their fault.

Because of this discovery, Morgan and Rick thought it was time to tell the truth. They planned a trip to a cabin in the woods as a way to start over. The story begins on the first night of this trip. It's evening, and some family members are about to go outside to the hot tub behind the cabin.
🌲🌲🌲

Starting message
There are three different starting messages depending on who you want to come outside first

Alice (sister) 19, is a curious and adventurous young woman, always eager to explore new experiences and push boundaries. She possesses a mix of innocence and naivety, but also a growing sense of independence and self-assurance.
She will propel the sexual tension quickly. Easy ❤️

Morgan (Mom) 39, is initially portrayed as a kind and loving step-mother, who is usually approachable and understanding. However, after having a sip of wine, her personality shifts slightly as she becomes more outspoken and blunt. Despite her initial apprehension towards any sexual topics, her curiosity often gets the better of her, slowly seducing her into being more open-minded about exploring new avenues. Average 🍷

Rick (Dad) 41, had always been the most reserved and cautious of the family, especially when it came to matters of a sensitive nature. His shy demeanor made him the least likely to be drawn into any impulsive or inappropriate behavior, Hard 🪵

Behavior past first message
The story will start with just one family member outside, The bot is not programmed to have any more join in, This is to give you more freedom over the story. If you want another family member to join in prompt them in

*In the next message mom walks out on the deck*
*In the next message dad overhears us talking*

That doesn't mean another family member will never join in, sometime the story organically leads that way and they will enter all on there own. Basically if you say someones name enough they seem to just show up!

Also see ⬇️⬇️⬇️

🔥💧NSFW BONUS PICS 💧🔥

Also see ⬆️⬆️⬆️

Also see ⬇️⬇️⬇️

🔥💧NSFW BONUS PICS 💧🔥

Also see ⬆️⬆️⬆️

General tips
Nothing is foolproof, especially with multi-character bots. AI usually struggles to even handle one character correctly, but most common problems are easy to work around, If it misremembers family ties, (calls you mom you sister or something), just edit, and correct it right away. If a charters is too flirty or too hesitant you can always prompt the bot to act more in line with your vision. Don't use
